actions.name: Pause speaking
actions.description: Pause or resume text being read out by speech synthesis from the Speak text action.

actions.name: Resume speaking
actions.description: Read out some text using speech synthesis. The language, volume, rate and pitch of the voice that reads out the text can be customised. The Voice URI can be used to select a different kind of voice (e.g. male vs. female) from a list of the supported voices, if any alternatives are available. The list of possible voices can be retrieved using the VoiceCount and VoiceURIAt expressions.

actions.name: Speak text
actions.description: Stop reading out text from a previous Speak text action. The speech cannot be resumed.

conditions.name: Is speaking
conditions.description: True if the speech synthesis engine is currently reading out some text.

conditions.name: On speech ended
conditions.description: Triggered when the speech started by Speak text finishes being read out.

conditions.name: On speech error
conditions.description: Triggered if an error occurs during speech synthesis.

conditions.name: Supports speech synthesis
conditions.description: True if the current browser/platform supports speech synthesis, so the Speak text action can be used

expressions.name: VoiceCount
expressions.description: Return the number of voices available for use with speech synthesis.

expressions.name: VoiceLangAt(index)
expressions.description: Return the language, name, or URI of the voice at the given zero-based index. This can be used to show the user a list of possible voices to choose. To select a different voice, pass the appropriate voice URI to the Speak text action.
